title: Tokyo high-protein frozen meal launch
business_question: Should a supermarket chain launch a high-protein, low-sugar frozen deli line in the Greater Tokyo market?

product_or_service.name: Protein Deli Series
product_or_service.description: A frozen deli series focused on high protein, low sugar, and quick weekday preparation.

assumptions: Initial launch is limited to urban and suburban Tokyo stores.
Messaging combines health and time-saving benefits.
No large-scale loyalty promotion is active in the first month.
